name: Dominions 2 - The Ascension Wars
short_description: Dominions II is turn based fantasy game in which you take the role of a powerful being that is trying to become the supreme god. The type of Gods can vary from magically powerful arch mages to old dragons or statues. The game features a large variety of spells and units.
detailed_description:
Dominions II: The Ascension Wars is a turn based fantasy game in which you take the role of a pretending god. It's the sequel to Dominions: Priests, Prophets & Pretenders.

Each pretender is Lord and Master of one of seventeen cultures, each with its own individual strengths and weaknesses. With the aid of soldiers and mages you will conquer the lands of your neighbors in a struggle for total domination.

Priests and prophets will preach throughout the world to spread your dominion, the manifestation of your divine supremacy.

Features:

* 1-17 Players. Play single player or with up to 16 friends (hotseat, PbEM, TCP/IP).

* More than 1000 different units.

* More than 500 unique spells.

* More than 300 magic items.

* Design your own God by choosing his physical form, magic skills and how his dominion affects the world.

* Dominion. Make sure that the dominion of enemy gods doesn't enter and corrupt your lands.

* The worlds most famous heroes will be granted heroic abilities that grows with their fame.

* Mercenaries are bought on a global market, all players can bid, but only one will get them.

* Build fortresses to protect your lands and to boost your production. Fortresses must be besieged before they can be stormed.

* Huge automatic battles with hundreds of units.

* Much improved user interface compared to Dominions I.

* Modding is possible.
